title: adelobotrys subsessilis
intro: Adelobotrys subsessilis, a type of flowering plant, is a species in the family Calophyllaceae. It is traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which may contribute to its various health benefits. The health benefits of Adelobotrys subsessilis may include the treatment of fever, pain, and digestive issues. The herbal preparation of this plant is typically made into a decoction or infusion and consumed as a tea to utilize its medicinal properties.
